name: Fettuccine Uzie
recipeIngredient: 8 large Sea scallops, cut in half horizontally
12 medium Raw shrimp, peeled -- deveined and butterflied (keep tails)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in a 4-quart pot of boiling water with salt and oil until al dente. Drain.
2. Heat an 11-inch saucepan over medium heat. Add butter, shallots, and garlic. Cook until translucent.
3. Add shrimp and scallops; simmer for one minute.
4. Add cream and reduce heat to a simmer. Stir in the pasta, salt, and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until shellfish and pasta are al dente.
5. Garnish with parsley and serve. If using fresh fettuccine, cook only 1-2 minutes; packaged noodles may require 8-12 minutes. The starch from the pasta helps bind the sauce. May be served as an entree.
